reason: The image depicts a group of individuals inspecting a treasure hoard near the ocean. The clothing and equipment present several issues. While the clothing styles are plausible, the light source (a modern lightbulb on a tripod) is anachronistic. The camera also looks very modern for 1985. The overall atmosphere does evoke a sense of discovery, but the technical inconsistencies invalidate it for strict historical accuracy. The presence of the modern-looking electric light is the primary reason for rejection.
